channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vietnam Veteran Lost for Four Days in Arizona Wilderness Rescued by His Son
item.description: Mark Young survived four days in the Arizona wilderness, dealing with dehydration and a rattlesnake encounter, before being located by his son during an extensive search.

item.title: US Envoy Witkoff and Kushner to Travel to Pakistan for Iran Diplomatic Talks
item.description: The White House confirmed Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan, where Iran's foreign minister has also arrived, to advance peace discussions.

item.title: Democrat Senator Warren Criticizes DOJ Decision to Drop Powell Investigation
item.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren characterized the Justice Department's decision to close its inquiry into Fed Chair Jerome Powell as a move to ease the path for the president's preferred nominee.

item.title: Judge Orders Release of Family Held in Longest Immigration Detention of Trump's Term
item.description: A federal judge ordered the release of a woman and her five children, relatives of the 2025 Colorado fire attack suspect, who had been held under immigration detention.

item.title: Republican Congressman Tom Kean Absent from Votes Due to Health Matter
item.description: Speaker Johnson said Rep. Tom Kean, who has not cast a vote since March 5 and holds a top-targeted seat, is expected to return to Congress very soon.
